domain_archetypes.name: halluminate evidence replay
domain_archetypes.trigger: halluminate signal changes while assets context is stale
domain_archetypes.expected: block release until cited evidence is regenerated

domain_archetypes.name: assets boundary probe
domain_archetypes.trigger: assets handoff crosses a policy or trust boundary
domain_archetypes.expected: route to reviewer with evidence packet

domain_archetypes.name: westworld regression harness
domain_archetypes.trigger: westworld behavior regresses against the last accepted fixture
domain_archetypes.expected: open a regression issue with trace and benchmark delta

domain_archetypes.name: webbench operator packet
domain_archetypes.trigger: webbench output needs a human-readable audit packet
domain_archetypes.expected: accept only if decision claims cite fixture evidence
